majorArcana.name: Fool
majorArcana.upright: Open hidden layer, new force, or second thread

majorArcana.name: Magician
majorArcana.upright: Add tools, leverage, deliberate supernatural method

majorArcana.name: High Priestess
majorArcana.upright: Reveal real nature, key secret, or hidden clue

majorArcana.name: Empress
majorArcana.upright: Spread influence, infestation, healing, life-tied force

majorArcana.name: Emperor
majorArcana.upright: Faction, hierarchy, or command intervenes

majorArcana.name: Hierophant
majorArcana.upright: Sacred law, ritual order, divine structure
majorArcana.reversed: Corrupted rite or rigid dogma harms hunt

majorArcana.name: Lovers
majorArcana.upright: Relationship, pact, tether defines case

majorArcana.name: Chariot
majorArcana.upright: Push hunt forward: chase, pursuit, acceleration
majorArcana.reversed: Pace turns hostile; loss of control

majorArcana.name: Strength
majorArcana.upright: Gain control over fear, affliction, pressure

majorArcana.name: Hermit
majorArcana.upright: Solitary clue, witness, record becomes key
majorArcana.reversed: Lose support; team is cut off

majorArcana.name: Wheel of Fortune
majorArcana.upright: Shift direction, timing, pressure track
majorArcana.reversed: Bad timing or reversal hurts team

majorArcana.name: Justice
majorArcana.upright: Expose lie, debt, old wrong

majorArcana.name: Hanged Man
majorArcana.upright: Progress requires real cost or delay

majorArcana.name: Death
majorArcana.upright: Threat changes form; phase ends

majorArcana.name: Temperance
majorArcana.upright: Stabilize scene or mixed forces

majorArcana.name: Devil
majorArcana.upright: Temptation, possession, affliction grows
majorArcana.reversed: Chance to resist but not free

majorArcana.name: Tower
majorArcana.upright: Catastrophe, breach, structural failure

majorArcana.name: Star
majorArcana.upright: Major clue, recovery, moral center appears

majorArcana.name: Moon
majorArcana.upright: Confusion, concealment, false readings

majorArcana.name: Sun
majorArcana.upright: Expose truth, reveal path, remove false leads
majorArcana.reversed: Success with cost or arrogant mistake

majorArcana.name: Judgment
majorArcana.upright: Force confrontation; reveal what must be answered

majorArcana.name: World
majorArcana.upright: Resolve loop, mark milestone

Blades.reversal: violence is hidden, mistimed, misdirected, or unstable

openingClues: old photograph with face scratched out
Blood.reversal: emotional truth is buried, twisted, or manipulated

Relics.reversal: preparation fails, gear is flawed, or tools come with cost

Sigils.caseStyle: summoning, warding, cult or threshold case
Sigils.reversal: rituals misfire, structures break, or occult process twists

knows: someone from town lied to police
the missing person followed a voice
the air smelled like sulfur or rot
hides: they ran and left someone behind

knows: old wards were built under the site
a bell was removed decades ago
hides: the seal was weakened once before

knows: the old file named the wrong entity
the right weakness is not obvious

skills.success: notice anomaly or danger before it acts
gain clue or narrow entity list
confirm lore, anchor, weakness, or historical pattern
read motive, lie, fear, or emotional truth
spirit provides truth, warning, or anchor hint
identify occult structure or entity category
reduce crossing, possession, or manifestation risk
deal damage if correct weakness/prep exists
control or damage if method is valid
locate movement route or lair clue
prep item added or trap improves

skills.failure: strain, GM influence, or affliction trigger

spells.name: Veil Snap
spells.roll: Will + Ritual Basics or Presence Sense
spells.effect: Expose hidden spirit, glamour, hidden sigil, or disguised host tell

spells.name: Lantern Spark
spells.effect: Remove darkness setback and reveal weak concealment

spells.name: Spirit Lash
spells.effect: Direct occult harm to manifested spirit

spells.name: Protective Circle
spells.effect: Block or slow spirits, demons, unstable manifestations

spells.name: Anchor Revelation
spells.effect: Learn broad anchor type and location hint

spells.name: Exorcist Litany
spells.roll: Will + Ritual Casting + Spirit Communication or Occult Knowledge
spells.effect: Drive possessor from host over 3 rounds

bestiary.name: Vengeful Spirit / Onryo
behaviors: becomes more physical as it rises
bestiary.kill: locate remains and burn them or resolve the grudge

bestiary.name: Poltergeist
bestiary.kill: identify anchor person and remove or resolve emotional trigger

bestiary.name: Wraith
bestiary.kill: destroy tether object after revealing it

bestiary.name: Woman in White
bestiary.kill: resolve emotional loop or lay remains to rest

bestiary.name: Possessor Demon
bestiary.kill: separate demon from host, trap or banish before repossession

bestiary.name: Grief Haunt
bestiary.kill: name the grief, resolve the anchor, cleanse the mourning object

bestiary.name: Werewolf / Rugaru
bestiary.kill: silver strike to heart or complete entity-specific kill condition

bestiary.name: Vampire
bestiary.kill: destroy heart and force sunlight or sanctified end condition

bestiary.name: Wendigo
bestiary.kill: burn completely before it feeds again

bestiary.name: Crossroads Demon
bestiary.kill: break contract or destroy anchor, then bind by true name

bestiary.name: Changeling
bestiary.kill: reveal true form, break exchange bargain, strike with iron or force retreat

bestiary.name: Redcap
bestiary.kill: corner away from blood source, ruin cap, finish with iron

bestiary.name: Veil Render
bestiary.kill: collapse rift structure, then banish or bind before veil reseals

investigate.roll: best of Intellect/Instinct + Investigation/Awareness/skill match - setbacks
